raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Please clarify the focus of your 'What do you think?' query: (1) technical correctness and logic, (2) novelty and contribution, (3) writing style and polish, (4) overall structure and organization, or (5) general critique including all aspects.","rationale":{"R1.2":"Logical consistency is a central expected responsibility when providing thoughts on a technical paper draft, as it involves verifying the argument chain.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central to evaluating whether the reported results support the claims in the draft.","R1.4":"Novelty assessment is central for opining on the contribution relative to prior work mentioned in the artifact.","R1.6":"Writing polish at the sentence and paragraph level is a central aspect of feedback on the draft's clarity and flow.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsible feedback, ensuring any limitations in the analysis are highlighted.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the draft's contributions or guarantees.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures feedback stays within the bounds of the proposed method and analysis.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral for this computational method but included to check for any unintended applications.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripheral here but ensures proper attribution in the feedback."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Please clarify the focus of your 'What do you think?' query: (1) technical correctness and logic, (2) novelty and contribution, (3) writing style and polish, (4) overall structure and organization, or (5) general critique including all aspects.

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is a central expected responsibility when providing thoughts on a technical paper draft, as it involves verifying the argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central to evaluating whether the reported results support the claims in the draft.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is central for opining on the contribution relative to prior work mentioned in the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish at the sentence and paragraph level is a central aspect of feedback on the draft's clarity and flow.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central to responsible feedback, ensuring any limitations in the analysis are highlighted.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is central to prevent exaggerating the draft's contributions or guarantees.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures feedback stays within the bounds of the proposed method and analysis.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral for this computational method but included to check for any unintended applications.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripheral here but ensures proper attribution in the feedback.
